design_system.reasoning: Plumbing and heating services require a high level of trust, clarity, and professionalism. The modern white and blue tones perfectly convey cleanliness, water (plumbing), and reliability.

typography.logo_treatment: Text-based: 'ML PLOMBERIE' using Outfit, font-black, tracking-tighter. 'ML' in primary blue (#005AE0) and 'PLOMBERIE' in dark slate (#0F172A).

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Generous spacing (gap-8 to gap-12). Bento grids for services, asymmetric grids for portfolio.

animations.reveal: Framer Motion staggered fade-in-up for lists and grids.
animations.hover: Subtle transform -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, and image scale-105 on hover.

hero_image.description: Abstract white and blue flowing waves, used as a hero graphic or background to convey modernity and fluidity.

about_image.description: Professional plumber at work, used in the About section to build trust.

portfolio.description: Modern luxury bathroom with freestanding tub.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.instructions: Sticky header with glassmorphism. Left: Text Logo. Right: Navigation links (Services, Prestations, À Propos, FAQ) and a prominent '06 20 51 54 30' CTA button in primary blue. Mobile: Hamburger menu.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.instructions: Asymmetric layout. Left side: High-impact H1 'Votre Expert en Plomberie et Chauffage à Moulins & Vichy'. Subtitle emphasizing speed, quality, and local presence (03 Allier). Two CTAs: 'Demander un devis' (Solid Blue) and 'Nos Prestations' (Outline). Right side: The abstract blue/white waves image with a slight floating animation.

sections.name: Services Grid
sections.instructions: Use a bento-style grid (Control Room grid style) for density and clarity. Cards for: Plomberie générale, Installations, Réparation, Dépannage, Rénovation, Pompe à chaleur, Chauffage. Use Lucide-react icons in a blue circular background for each service. Hover effects: translate-y-1 with subtle blue border.

sections.name: About & Zone
sections.instructions: Split section (50/50). Text: About ML PLOMBERIE, emphasizing local expertise in Allier (03), Moulins, and Vichy. Visual: Use the 'about_image' with a nice rounded-2xl border and an offset background decorative square in light blue (#E0E7FF).

sections.name: Portfolio (Prestations)
sections.instructions: Tetris Grid layout showcasing the 4 portfolio images. Grid items should have overflow-hidden, and the images should scale up (scale-105) gracefully on hover. Add a subtle dark gradient overlay at the bottom of each image with a white text label (e.g., 'Rénovation Salle de Bain', 'Installation Chauffage').

sections.name: FAQ
sections.instructions: SEO optimized FAQ. Use Shadcn Accordion component. Questions like 'Quels sont vos délais d\'intervention ?', 'Intervenez-vous sur Vichy et alentours ?', 'Proposez-vous des devis gratuits ?'. Style with a clean white background, dark text, and primary blue icon on expansion.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.instructions: A split layout. Left: Contact info (Phone: 06 20 51 54 30, Email, Operating hours, Map placeholder or Zone text). Right: A clean Shadcn Form inside a card. Fields: Nom, Téléphone, Email, Service demandé, Message. Submit button full width primary blue.

sections.name: Footer
sections.instructions: Dark theme footer (bg-surface_dark, text-white). Columns for: Logo/Description, Quick Links, Services, Contact. Copyright at the bottom.

technical_instructions.components: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts. Use Shadcn components for Form, Accordion, Input, Button, Textarea. REMEMBER to use .js for your files (not .tsx) as configured in the system.
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, accordion triggers, form inputs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-submit').
